items.title: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
items.dek: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.
items.body: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israeli soldiers punished over vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
items.dek: Two soldiers will be removed from combat duty and receive 30 days of military detention, Israel's military says.
items.body: Two soldiers will be removed from combat duty and receive 30 days of military detention, Israel's military says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Vrabel: I had 'difficult' talks over Russini photos
items.dek: Mike Vrabel said the Patriots and their fans will get "the best version of me going forward" after the New York Post published photos that appeared to show the
items.body: Mike Vrabel said the Patriots and their fans will get "the best version of me going forward" after the New York Post published photos that appeared to show the coach embracing and holding hands with former Athletic reporter Dianna Russini.
items.author: IriLine Desk
